reviews.comment:
Tienen que cambiar de actitud.  Cada vez que voy tengo problema, no reciben débito, el servicompras el limitado y aveces en verano tienen combustible. De todas maneras el personal siempre es muy atento

(Translated by Google)
They need to change their attitude. Every time I go, I have a problem: they don't accept debit cards, the convenience store is limited, and sometimes they only have fuel in the summer. However, the staff is always very helpful.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/829312115577397471/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNncnQ3TnR3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Lugar agradable, tiene un sector de asadores donde permiten acampar en caso que el paso a chile esté cerrado.. Buena atención de los empleados.

(Translated by Google)
Nice place, it has a barbecue area where camping is allowed if the road to Chile is closed. Good service from the staff.
